$description: Bank UI Kit global design tokens — the single, platform-neutral source of truth. Format: W3C Design Tokens Community Group (DTCG). The scalar tokens here generate lib/src/theme/tokens.dart via `dart run tool/generate_tokens.dart`; CI fails if the two drift. Composite tokens (text styles, easing curves, shadows) remain hand-authored in Dart and reference these values. Per-brand theme tokens are exported separately to tokens/themes/ via BankThemeData.toJson (see test/theme_export_test.dart).

positiveBalance.$description: Positive balances on light surfaces (emerald-700, AA).

negativeBalance.$description: Negative / overdue amounts on light surfaces (AA).

pending.$description: Pending states on light surfaces (amber-700, AA).

positiveBalanceDark.$description: Positive balances on dark surfaces (emerald-400, AA).

negativeBalanceDark.$description: Negative amounts on dark surfaces (red-400, AA).

pendingDark.$description: Pending states on dark surfaces (amber-400, AA).

success.$description: System-level success feedback on light surfaces (emerald-700, AA). Unified with positiveBalance so one green family reads as "good" everywhere.

successDark.$description: System-level success feedback on dark surfaces (emerald-400, AA).

warning.$description: System-level warning feedback on light surfaces (amber-700, AA). Unified with pending.

warningDark.$description: System-level warning feedback on dark surfaces (amber-400, AA).

danger.$description: System-level danger / destructive-action on light surfaces (AA). Unified with negativeBalance.

dangerDark.$description: System-level danger / destructive-action on dark surfaces (red-400, AA).

investmentGain.$description: Investment gain on light surfaces. Same family as positiveBalance / success — one green per screen.

investmentGainDark.$description: Investment gain on dark surfaces (emerald-400, AA).

investmentLoss.$description: Investment loss on light surfaces. Same family as negativeBalance / danger.

investmentLossDark.$description: Investment loss on dark surfaces (red-400, AA).

creditAvailable.$description: Available credit headroom. Same family as positiveBalance / success.

creditUsed.$description: Credit already utilised. Same family as pending / warning.

networkMastercardBlend.$description: Mastercard brand mark: the overlapping-lens blend colour.

stateLayerHoverOpacity.$description: Hover state-layer opacity over interactive surfaces (M3-aligned).

stateLayerPressedOpacity.$description: Pressed state-layer opacity over interactive surfaces.

stateLayerFocusOpacity.$description: Keyboard-focus state-layer opacity over interactive surfaces.

disabledOpacity.$description: Opacity applied to disabled interactive content (M3-aligned).

focusRingWidth.$description: Stroke width of the keyboard-focus ring, in logical px.

focusRingOpacity.$description: Opacity of the primary-coloured keyboard-focus ring.

pressScale.$description: Scale applied to a pressable surface while pressed.

frozenCardSaturation.$description: Saturation multiplier for frozen card faces (desaturated, not greyed out).

minTapTarget.$description: Minimum touch/tap target (WCAG 2.5.5 AAA / iOS HIG).

tileCompactBreakpoint.$description: Below this available width, metric tiles switch to their compact layout.
